narrative:
Clark Twp West (precinct in Brown County) has 926 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
